retire_year.text: ปีที่เกษียณอายุ

calint_date.text: วันที่คำนวณดอกเบี้ย

membership_no.text: เลขทะเบียน

root.sql:
select sum(tab.row_memno)over(order by tab.membership_no , tab.loan_contract_no ) as rowno, tab.* from ( select decode(lag(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no,1,null)over( order by sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no , sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no ) ,sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ,0,1 ) as row_memno , sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no , pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no) as member_name , pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate( pka_lon_reqsrv.fp_calc_member_retire(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ) ) as retire_date , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_name , sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type_description , sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_type , sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no , sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance , sc_mem_m_share_mem.share_stock , sc_mem_m_member_work_info.salary_id , pka_lon_intsrv.fp_calint(sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no,'!calint_date!',sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance,sc_lon_m_loan_card.last_calcint_date,'PL') as int_calc
from sc_mem_m_membership_registered , sc_lon_m_loan_card , sc_lon_m_rule , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group , sc_mem_m_member_work_info , sc_mem_m_share_mem where sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no and sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_type = sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type and sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no and sc_mem_m_member_work_info.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no and sc_mem_m_share_mem.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no and extract(year from pka_lon_reqsrv.fp_calc_member_retire(sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no )) = '!retire_year!' and sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance > '0' and sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_type not in ('12','50') and sc_mem_m_member_work_info.retire_status <> '1' and sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no = '600' /*WHERE*/ --and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = '01960' order by sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no , sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_type ) tab
